title: Crown of Salt - Archivist Nun Sister Mirel Dossier
prompt: Story: Crown of Salt (crown-of-salt) | Hook: A relic-smuggling cartel launders artifacts through a city that disappears at dawn tide. | Subgenre: occult conspiracy | Tone: CINEMATIC | Location: Port authority archives and salt catacombs | Villain: The Salt Regent | Villain worldview: Order comes from controlled sin, not clean law. | Motifs: salt crowns, wet ledgers, cargo seals. Write in-world dossier for Archivist Nun Sister Mirel including known history, hidden motives, trust thresholds, and clue-link references for interactive evidence board.
negativePrompt: Avoid out-of-world slang, avoid anachronistic technology references, avoid contradictory chronology.
